name: Depths of Insanity
short_description: 3D First-Person Adventure with exploration and uncovering secrets of the areas surrounding your crash site.Collect all necessary materials to craft a temporary home and hopefully find a way to rebuild your Spacecraft and return home before it's too late.The Universe is in your hands!
detailed_description:
When a Space Marine named Slaug, strangely loses control of his Spacecraft and is forced to crash-land on Planet Earth.

He quickly becomes aware of some WEIRD THINGS HAPPENING IN THE AREA [Or is it just inside his head?]

A Sinister force is threatening his life and he doesn't even know it!

Do what you must to get that Spacecraft spaceworthy again. Is he just dreaming?
What really happened after the crash?

  • First person 2.5D Adventure

  • Action with different weapons

  • Explore the world in any direction

  • No hand-holding. Just pure fun!

  • A bunch of cool Quests

  • Build a House and furnish it

  • Secrets everywhere

  • 100 Songs to find and play in game as you play

  • Mini-Games

  • Weird & Quirky Cozy Fun!

3D First-Person Adventure with exploration and uncovering secrets of the areas surrounding your crash site.

Collect all necessary materials to craft a temporary home and hopefully find a way to rebuild your Spacecraft and return home before it's too late.

The Universe is in your hands (head)!

Depths of Insanity 1 is a delirious fantasy made up in Slaug's head when being knocked out.
Depths of Insanity 2 is just a side story in the same franchise.
Depths of Insanity 3 is the Origin Story where everything starts after waking up from a knockout.
